---
title: "Home"
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero-banner}
::: {.hero-grid}
::: {.hero-text}

# James Peabody {.hero-name}

## Experimental psychologist • quantitative methods • reproducible research

I build and communicate rigorous statistical analyses with a focus on psychometrics, multilevel modeling, structural equation modeling, and reproducible reporting in **R** and **Quarto**.

::: {.hero-buttons}
[View CV](cv.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg}
[Browse Research Reports](reports/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-lg}
:::

:::

::: {.hero-image}
![](images/headshot.jpg){fig-alt="Professional headshot" .profile-photo}
:::
:::
:::

## Overview

This site serves as a professional home for my academic work, teaching materials, and selected Quarto-based research reports. It is designed to make technical work easier to browse, interpret, and share.

::: {.grid .overview-grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### Research

My interests include psychometrics, social identity processes, multilevel modeling, mediation, SEM, and the communication of quantitative results in clear and usable formats.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### Teaching

I develop graduate-level materials in statistics, psychometrics, and research methods, with an emphasis on conceptual clarity and applied workflows in R.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### Reproducible Workflows

I use Quarto, R, and related tools to build reproducible analysis documents, dashboards, and reporting systems that are both technically robust and easy to navigate.
:::

:::

## Featured Areas

::: {.grid .feature-grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.feature-card}
### Research Reports

A growing collection of Quarto-based reports that combine narrative, code, model output, tables, and visualizations in a web-friendly format.

- [All reports](reports/index.qmd)
- [RPG Model Report](reports/rpg-model-report.qmd)
- [PPG Model Report](reports/ppg-model-report.qmd)
- [Entitativity Mediation Report](reports/entitativity-mediation.qmd)
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.feature-card}
### Professional Materials

Use the site to browse background information, academic interests, and professional documents.

- [About](about.qmd)
- [Curriculum Vitae](cv.qmd)
- [Projects](projects/index.qmd)
- [Contact](contact.qmd)
:::
:::

:::

## Selected Reports

::: {.grid .report-grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.report-card}
### RPG Model

A structured report template for model overview, assumptions, fitted results, and post hoc comparisons.

[Open report →](reports/rpg-model-report.qmd)
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.report-card}
### PPG Model

A parallel reporting structure for a second analysis workflow, designed for consistency and readability.

[Open report →](reports/ppg-model-report.qmd)
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.report-card}
### Entitativity Mediation

A mediation report template focused on model structure, diagnostics, indirect effects, and interpretation.

[Open report →](reports/entitativity-mediation.qmd)
:::
:::

:::

## Approach

::: {.callout-note}
## Why this site exists
I am especially interested in making technical quantitative work more interpretable without sacrificing rigor. This site brings together professional materials and analysis reports in a format that supports both transparency and accessibility.
:::

## Get in touch

If you are interested in collaboration, teaching, research methods, or applied quantitative work, please visit the [contact page](contact.qmd).
